hero.subtitle:
A free-input rhythm game — kick back and play with a controller!
An all-new kind of rhythm experience arrives in early 2027!

rechor.name: Rechor
rechor.desc: A maintenance robot of unknown origin, forever tending to the equipment and tidying up the rooms. She's prone to clumsy little mishaps, yet built tough enough that she never really gets hurt. Polite and gentle in manner, though every so often an unreadable look crosses her face — as if she were keeping some extraordinary secret.

eiria.name: Eiria
eiria.desc: A breezy, high-spirited girl who clearly comes from no ordinary background — could she secretly be a young lady of privilege? She's dead set on pushing the Tuning Project forward, though more often than not it looks like she's just bossing everyone around. Her obsession with games and snacks is a little worrying, and the flashes of loneliness she lets slip make her hard to look away from.

tune.title: TUNE Mode
tune.desc:
A complete reinvention of the traditional rhythm game!
No fixed keys — only pure, free expression:
Under the "Note Affinity" system, play your own melody with the fingering you love best.

fight.title: Fight Mode
fight.desc:
Face fearsome foes — or old friends — in the thick of the melody.
Attack, defend, unleash Finishing Moves — everything moves with the music.
Duel to the rhythm, and fight to save the world!
